description:
Use Epi Info 7 StatCalc to calculate the sample size for an unmatched case-control study.

Scenario: An environmental epidemiologist is designing a study on Superfund site proximity and childhood leukemia.

Goal: Determine the required number of cases and controls and save a report.

Parameters:
- Two-sided Confidence Level: 95%
- Power: 80%
- Ratio of controls to cases: 3
- Percent of controls exposed: 15%
- Odds Ratio: 2.0

Instructions:
1. Open StatCalc from the Epi Info 7 main menu.
2. Select 'Sample Size & Power' > 'Unmatched Case-Control'.
3. Enter the parameters listed above.
4. Read the results for all three methods (Kelsey, Fleiss with Continuity Correction, Fleiss without).
5. Create a text file at 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\casecontrol_samplesize_report.txt'.
6. In the file, list the study parameters, the results for all three methods (Cases, Controls, Total), and a one-sentence recommendation on which method to use (recommend Fleiss with Continuity Correction as it is most conservative).
